basic_details.job_title: IIM Ahmedabad Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIM Ahmedabad)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIM Ahmedabad) Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.iima.ac.in. The Research Assistant recruitment is being conducted on a contractual basis.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate (Master's) degree in Information Systems, Management, Data Science, Computer Science & Engineering, or related fields, Proficiency in Python and R, Experience in creating large datasets, data analysis, visualization, econometrics/statistics models, panel datasets and Stata, Natural language processing and text analytics preferred, Understanding of scientific process including literature review by reading and summarizing research papers
qualification.details: Postgraduate (Master's) degree in Information Systems, Management, Data Science, Computer Science & Engineering, or related fields. Proficiency in Python and R. Experience in creating large datasets, data analysis, visualization, econometrics/statistics models, panel datasets and Stata. Natural language processing and text analytics preferred. Understanding of scientific process including literature review by reading and summarizing research papers. PhD candidates considered for Research Associate.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIM Ahmedabad Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Postgraduate (Master's) degree in Information Systems, Management, Data Science, Computer Science & Engineering, or related fields. Proficiency in Python and R. Experience in creating large datasets, data analysis, visualization, econometrics/statistics models, panel datasets and Stata. Natural language processing and text analytics preferred. Understanding of scientific process including literature review by reading and summarizing research papers. PhD candidates considered for Research Associate.

content_sections.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIM Ahmedabad Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Ahmedabad Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIM Ahmedabad Research Assistant position is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: A Postgraduate (Master's) degree in Information Systems, Management, Data Science, Computer Science & Engineering, or related fields is required. Proficiency in Python and R is also essential.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Research Assistant position at IIM Ahmedabad?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job type for this Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The job type for the Research Assistant position at IIM Ahmedabad is contractual.

faq.question: Q6. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIM Ahmedabad).

faq.question: Q7. Are there any specific skills required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Yes, proficiency in Python and R, experience in data analysis, visualization, econometrics/statistics models, and panel datasets are preferred. Natural language processing and text analytics are also a plus.

faq.question: Q8. Can PhD candidates apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, PhD candidates are considered for the Research Associate position, which is related to this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is advised to download and read it carefully.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of this job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Ahmedabad, Gujarat.
